skip_reason: Instagram post pages render their content (and the time[datetime] elements this bookmarklet scans for) via client-side JS that typically requires a logged-in session; in headless CI without authentication, Instagram shows a login wall and no time[datetime] elements are present, so the bookmarklet would only hit its 'No timestamp elements found on this page.' alert path. Requires auth that can't be worked around in CI.
notes: Passive - finds all time[datetime] elements on the current page (post/story/comment timestamps) and appends an inline box showing the local and UTC absolute date/time next to each. target_url is a placeholder Instagram post URL; a real post URL would be needed for a logged-in manual test.
